title: Lesson 49: Past Tense (Line): Llamar, Tener, Ver, Ser and Ir
concepts: In this lesson we'll practice how to put this 'line in the past' Past Tense into practice and cover the three verbs which are irregular - ver, er and ir.

sentences.english: I call myself / my name is ...
How do you call yourself? / What is your name?
How does she call herself? / What is her name?
How did she call herself? / What was her name?
How did they call herselves? / What were their names?
I used to have a big house
I used to have a big house

sentences.spanish: Tenía cuatro pero ahora no me queda
sentences.english: I used to four but now I don't have any left
I have to see you
I had to see you
I had to see you yesterday
Did you have to do it yesterday
Didn't you have / weren't you supposed to do it yesterday
I|he|she was seeing / I|he|she used to see
You (informal) were seeing / you used to see
They|you guys were seeing / They|you guys used to see
We were seeing / We used to see
I was a student / I used to be a student
Were you a student?
We were students
What were they?
I was going / I used to go
We were going / We used to go
They were going/ They used to go
You (informal) were going / You used to go
Why were you (informal) going / Why did you used to go?
I was going to call you
I was going to do it make it
We were going to do it / make it
We were going to do them / make them
